{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Wellsworth Energy Services Limited (WESL) is a leading provider of energy services to exploration and production companies in Nigeria. By focusing on innovative technology, world-class safety practices, and personnel competence, WESL offers its clients high-quality support for their operations that translates to increased efficiency and lower operating costs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Process and post vendor and customer invoices accurately and in a timely manner
	Verify invoices against contracts, purchase orders, and supporting documents
	Generate and submit service work tickets (SWT) and invoices to customers
	Follow up on submitted invoices through customer e-procurement platforms to payment stage
	Liaise with customers to obtain approvals (e.g., Work Completion Certificates)
	Manage vendor invoicing, service entry sheets, and payment follow-ups
	Maintain accurate records and databases for all receivables and payables
	Perform bank reconciliations and monitor cash balances
	Support payment processing and ensure compliance with financial procedures
	Track and resolve vendor queries promptly
	Prepare periodic reports including aged analysis of receivables and payables
	Maintain proper filing and documentation systems.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 3 years&rsquo; experience in a similar finance role
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial processes
	Proficiency in accounting systems and Microsoft Office tools
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	ICAN certification will be an added advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;HR@wellsworthenergy.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Account Officer Job at Wellsworth Energy Services Limited




        
    

        
        Wellsworth Energy Services Limited (WESL) is a leading provider of energy services to exploration and production companies in Nigeria. By focusing on innovative technology, world-class safety practices, and personnel competence, WESL offers its clients high-quality support for their operations that translates to increased efficiency and lower operating costs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Process and post vendor and customer invoices accurately and in a timely manner
	Verify invoices against contracts, purchase orders, and supporting documents
	Generate and submit service work tickets (SWT) and invoices to customers
	Follow up on submitted invoices through customer e-procurement platforms to payment stage
	Liaise with customers to obtain approvals (e.g., Work Completion Certificates)
	Manage vendor invoicing, service entry sheets, and payment follow-ups
	Maintain accurate records and databases for all receivables and payables
	Perform bank reconciliations and monitor cash balances
	Support payment processing and ensure compliance with financial procedures
	Track and resolve vendor queries promptly
	Prepare periodic reports including aged analysis of receivables and payables
	Maintain proper filing and documentation systems.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 3 years’ experience in a similar finance role
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial processes
	Proficiency in accounting systems and Microsoft Office tools
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	ICAN certification will be an added advantage.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "title": "Marketing Executive",
  "description": "Neutratech, a subsidiary of Coway, is a South Korean company primarily into designing and producing water and air purification devices. We have been in existence for over 32years and have won an award as the 6th best company in direct sales in the world, pulling in a net worth of $3.8billion.

Neutratech Nigeria is a reputable multinational company with over 15 years of industry experience and a strong track record of serving more than 20,000 satisfied customers. With operations across three African countries&mdash;Nigeria, Angola, and Mauritius&mdash;we pride ourselves on excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Gudu, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Must reside in Abuja.
	Age: 24 &ndash; 45 years.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work effectively in a team.
	Professional appearance and attitude.
	Owning a vehicle is an added advantage.


What We Offer


	Competitive base salary ranging from N150,000 to N400,000 monthly (based on performance).
	Opportunity for career growth in a thriving organization.
	A supportive and results-driven work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@neutratech.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;For more enquiries, you can also reach out to: 07074777123.",

Marketing Executive Job at Neutratech




        
    

        
        Neutratech, a subsidiary of Coway, is a South Korean company primarily into designing and producing water and air purification devices. We have been in existence for over 32years and have won an award as the 6th best company in direct sales in the world, pulling in a net worth of $3.8billion.

Neutratech Nigeria is a reputable multinational company with over 15 years of industry experience and a strong track record of serving more than 20,000 satisfied customers. With operations across three African countries—Nigeria, Angola, and Mauritius—we pride ourselves on excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Executive
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Gudu, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Must reside in Abuja.
	Age: 24 – 45 years.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work effectively in a team.
	Professional appearance and attitude.
	Owning a vehicle is an added advantage.


What We Offer


	Competitive base salary ranging from N150,000 to N400,000 monthly (based on performance).
	Opportunity for career growth in a thriving organization.
	A supportive and results-driven work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, you can also reach out to: 07074777123.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Technical Planner",
  "description": "Green Africa Airways Limited is a value airline based in Lagos, Nigeria. We are a new carrier that offers safe, reliable and affordable air travel to a much broader group of customers. 	Planning and controlling scheduled and unscheduled maintenance of Green Africa Airways fleet

	Preparing reports and perform other duties as may be required by CAMO Manager
	Preparing work orders and issuing in accordance with Green Africa Airways Approved Maintenance Programme
	Preparing lists of tools, parts, and materials required to perform scheduled work orders

	Reviewing and monitoring significant aircraft defects, recurring defects, dispatch reliability, MEL usage, MEL deviation and highlight trends and identify root causes
	Continuously reviewing defects on log pages and on routine maintenance task cards and update the reliability database to ensure defects are rectified promptly
	Monitoring reliability, preparing regular reliability board meetings, and regular reliability reporting to Management

	Bachelor&#39;s degree or Higher National Diploma in Avionics, Aeronautical, Mechanical, Electrical Engineering or any other related discipline
	3-5 years of experience as a Maintenance planner or Reliability Engineer in Aviation
	Knowledge of Aircraft systems, Aircraft Maintenance Program as well as a comprehensive understanding of Maintenance and Engineering requirements of an aircraft.

	Decisive and self-starting attitude&nbsp;
	Ability to manage information sources and work under pressure&nbsp;
	Maintenance planning and programming skills&nbsp;
	Attention to details

	Analytical skills&nbsp;
	Time management skills.

Technical Planner Job at Green Africa Airways Limited




        
    

        
        Green Africa Airways Limited is a value airline based in Lagos, Nigeria. We are a new carrier that offers safe, reliable and affordable air travel to a much broader group of customers. This positions us as a significant contributor to the economic development of Nigeria and the African continent.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Planner

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Job role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Planning and controlling scheduled and unscheduled maintenance of Green Africa Airways fleet
	Identifying and recommending the necessary changes to Approved Maintenance Program to improve overall dispatch reliability
	Preparing reports and perform other duties as may be required by CAMO Manager
	Preparing work orders and issuing in accordance with Green Africa Airways Approved Maintenance Programme
	Preparing lists of tools, parts, and materials required to perform scheduled work orders
	Performing checks on the accomplished work orders including verification for filling, signing off, finalizing CRS, closing in the Airworthiness system, and archiving Hard copy and Digital copy
	Reviewing and monitoring significant aircraft defects, recurring defects, dispatch reliability, MEL usage, MEL deviation and highlight trends and identify root causes
	Continuously reviewing defects on log pages and on routine maintenance task cards and update the reliability database to ensure defects are rectified promptly
	Monitoring reliability, preparing regular reliability board meetings, and regular reliability reporting to Management


Qualifications


	Bachelor's degree or Higher National Diploma in Avionics, Aeronautical, Mechanical, Electrical Engineering or any other related discipline
	3-5 years of experience as a Maintenance planner or Reliability Engineer in Aviation
	Knowledge of Aircraft systems, Aircraft Maintenance Program as well as a comprehensive understanding of Maintenance and Engineering requirements of an aircraft.


Must have skills:


	Well-developed analytical, numerical, negotiation and problem-solving skill 
	Decisive and self-starting attitude 
	Ability to manage information sources and work under pressure 
	Maintenance planning and programming skills 
	Attention to details


Good to have skills:


	Analytical skills 
	Time management skills.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Brand Manager",
  "description": "At Castel Resources Consultancy Limited, we unlock your business&#39;s full potential with our comprehensive HR outsourcing services. Our expert team handles everything from recruitment and payroll processing to employee benefits administration and compliance, freeing you from administrative burdens and ensuring legal compliance. With advanced HR technology, strategic planning, and dedicated support for employee development and relations, we streamline your HR functions, allowing you to focus on your core business activities and drive growth. Partner with us to elevate your HR capabilities and achieve seamless, efficient operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Brand Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a strategic and creative Brand Manager to build, manage, and grow the company&rsquo;s brand presence
	The ideal candidate will drive brand awareness, ensure consistent messaging, and execute marketing strategies that increase visibility and customer engagement.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement brand strategies and campaigns
	Ensure consistency in brand messaging across all platforms
	Manage digital and offline marketing initiatives
	Conduct market research and analyze consumer trends
	Oversee content creation and brand communication
	Monitor brand performance and campaign effectiveness
	Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to drive growth
	Manage brand budgets and partnerships.


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in Marketing, Business Administration, or related fields
	Proven experience in brand management or marketing
	Strong understanding of digital marketing and branding
	Excellent communication and creative thinking skills
	Ability to analyze data and make strategic decisions
	Experience with social media and marketing tools.


Key Skills:


	Brand strategy &amp; positioning
	Digital marketing
	Communication &amp; storytelling
	Creativity
	Data analysis.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;castelhrjobs@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Brand Manager Job at Castel Resources Consultancy Limited




        
    

        
        At Castel Resources Consultancy Limited, we unlock your business's full potential with our comprehensive HR outsourcing services. Our expert team handles everything from recruitment and payroll processing to employee benefits administration and compliance, freeing you from administrative burdens and ensuring legal compliance. With advanced HR technology, strategic planning, and dedicated support for employee development and relations, we streamline your HR functions, allowing you to focus on your core business activities and drive growth. Partner with us to elevate your HR capabilities and achieve seamless, efficient operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Brand Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a strategic and creative Brand Manager to build, manage, and grow the company’s brand presence
	The ideal candidate will drive brand awareness, ensure consistent messaging, and execute marketing strategies that increase visibility and customer engagement.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement brand strategies and campaigns
	Ensure consistency in brand messaging across all platforms
	Manage digital and offline marketing initiatives
	Conduct market research and analyze consumer trends
	Oversee content creation and brand communication
	Monitor brand performance and campaign effectiveness
	Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to drive growth
	Manage brand budgets and partnerships.


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in Marketing, Business Administration, or related fields
	Proven experience in brand management or marketing
	Strong understanding of digital marketing and branding
	Excellent communication and creative thinking skills
	Ability to analyze data and make strategic decisions
	Experience with social media and marketing tools.


Key Skills:


	Brand strategy & positioning
	Digital marketing
	Communication & storytelling
	Creativity
	Data analysis.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
